item.title: Department of War games
item.description: Michael Ramirez cartoon on Pete Hegseth, military politicization.

item.title: Should daylight saving time really be permanent?
item.description: Daylight saving time, Boomer capital, degree cost and more, in readers' eyes.

item.title: Look at Earth’s orbit. This mess is dangerous.
item.description: Space debris is a safety risk, both on the Earth’s surface and in orbit.

item.title: Ukraine is teaching Russia a lesson. The U.S. should take notes.
item.description: Ukrainian drones and rockets have punished underprotected Russian assets on Crimea.

item.title: Is Haley Stevens talking Michiganese?
item.description: Whatever she was doing, the congresswoman reminds us of the glory of regional speech.

item.title: Stop glamorizing cigarettes
item.description: The costs of cigarettes, alcohol and cannabis.

item.title: Why these three books have kept group chats going for months
item.description: The stories end in talk shows and movie deals. But the suffering is real.

item.title: The interview that exposed academia’s cluelessness
item.description: A leading academic’s bizarre response shows how insular college campuses are.

item.title: The right’s turn against Amy Coney Barrett makes no sense
item.description: The justice’s opinions are calm and fair-minded. The attacks on her are not.
